title: Pyrus deflexa

This family includes a wide range of plants, including fruit trees like apples and pears. Pyrus deflexa is specifically placed within the genus Pyrus, which comprises various species of pear trees. The genus Pyrus is further divided into several species, with Pyrus deflexa being one of them. intro: Pyrus deflexa, also known as the Himalayan wild pear, is a species of deciduous tree native to the Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent. The Himalayan wild pear is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing inflammation, fighting oxidative stress, and preventing infections.
